item.title: He Didn't Realise It Was All Recorded on CCTV
item.description: Lesly Palacio was just 22 years old when she vanished after leaving Las Vegas to meet Erick Rangel-Ibarra, the son of her godmother, for drinks in August 2020. Ten days later, her body was found in the remote Moapa Valley near Valley of Fire State Park, turning a missing-person case into a devastating fight for justice. Prosecutors later said surveillance footage showed Lesly’s lifeless body being dragged from a home and loaded into a truck, while the suspect’s father admitted helping move her body and then fleeing to Mexico. Even now, Lesly’s cause of death remains officially undetermined, leaving her family still searching for the full truth. After all these years, do you believe justice delayed can still feel like justice for Lesly’s loved ones?

media:content.media:title: He Didn't Realise It Was All Recorded on CCTV
media:content.media:description: Lesly Palacio was just 22 years old when she vanished after leaving Las Vegas to meet Erick Rangel-Ibarra, the son of her godmother, for drinks in August 2020. Ten days later, her body was found in the remote Moapa Valley near Valley of Fire State Park, turning a missing-person case into a devastating fight for justice. Prosecutors later said surveillance footage showed Lesly’s lifeless body being dragged from a home and loaded into a truck, while the suspect’s father admitted helping move her body and then fleeing to Mexico. Even now, Lesly’s cause of death remains officially undetermined, leaving her family still searching for the full truth. After all these years, do you believe justice delayed can still feel like justice for Lesly’s loved ones?

item.title: Pastor's Secret Affair Turned FATAL
item.description: In the court hearing “To Tabatha, I’m so sorry. I never meant to hurt you, and I pray that all of you guys will forgive me,” Daniels said. “I’m godly sorry, and I know it doesn’t take back what has happened, nor does it negate what has happened, but I want you to know that I am so sorry for the pain that I’ve caused you.” What are your thoughts about this case? - Em x

media:content.media:title: Pastor's Secret Affair Turned FATAL
media:content.media:description: In the court hearing “To Tabatha, I’m so sorry. I never meant to hurt you, and I pray that all of you guys will forgive me,” Daniels said. “I’m godly sorry, and I know it doesn’t take back what has happened, nor does it negate what has happened, but I want you to know that I am so sorry for the pain that I’ve caused you.” What are your thoughts about this case? - Em x

item.title: They Found the Bodybags in Their Own SHED!
item.description: Robert Leo Marzejka suffocated, and beat to death his sister, Danielle and her boyfriend Seren Bryan in August 2018 in their mobile home. Join me in my latest True crime episode where we take a deeper look at this horrific American case . Em x

media:content.media:title: They Found the Bodybags in Their Own SHED!
media:content.media:description: Robert Leo Marzejka suffocated, and beat to death his sister, Danielle and her boyfriend Seren Bryan in August 2018 in their mobile home. Join me in my latest True crime episode where we take a deeper look at this horrific American case . Em x

item.title: The Tragic Fate of 6 Children and the 2 Mothers Who Betrayed Them - The Hart Family Case
item.description: The Hart family case looked, from the outside, like a picture-perfect home. But in March 2018, Jennifer and Sarah Hart drove their SUV off a California cliff, killing themselves and their six adopted children after years of abuse allegations and warning signs that had been reported in multiple states. Investigators later concluded it was an intentional murder-suicide, turning the family’s carefully curated image into one of the most haunting child welfare failures in recent memory. How many chances to save these children were missed?

media:content.media:title: The Tragic Fate of 6 Children and the 2 Mothers Who Betrayed Them - The Hart Family Case
media:content.media:description: The Hart family case looked, from the outside, like a picture-perfect home. But in March 2018, Jennifer and Sarah Hart drove their SUV off a California cliff, killing themselves and their six adopted children after years of abuse allegations and warning signs that had been reported in multiple states. Investigators later concluded it was an intentional murder-suicide, turning the family’s carefully curated image into one of the most haunting child welfare failures in recent memory. How many chances to save these children were missed?

item.title: Charlie Hunt Was Too Young To Say Anything To His Mum
item.description: Charlie Hunt was just 15 months old when the person trusted to care for him became his killer. Darren Newton subjected the toddler to repeated abuse, even filming some of the attacks on his phone, before Charlie died from head injuries. Newton was later convicted of murder and sentenced to life in prison, while the case sparked fierce criticism of the failures that left such a vulnerable child unprotected. How do we make sure warning signs around children are never ignored again?

media:content.media:title: Charlie Hunt Was Too Young To Say Anything To His Mum
media:content.media:description: Charlie Hunt was just 15 months old when the person trusted to care for him became his killer. Darren Newton subjected the toddler to repeated abuse, even filming some of the attacks on his phone, before Charlie died from head injuries. Newton was later convicted of murder and sentenced to life in prison, while the case sparked fierce criticism of the failures that left such a vulnerable child unprotected. How do we make sure warning signs around children are never ignored again?

item.title: The $30,000,000 SCAM That Led To His Demise
item.description: When Steven Riley Jr. told his girlfriend Ina Kenoyer about a $30 million inheritance, it should have been life-changing news. Instead, it became the beginning of a deadly plan...

media:content.media:description: When Steven Riley Jr. told his girlfriend Ina Kenoyer about a $30 million inheritance, it should have been life-changing news. Instead, it became the beginning of a deadly plan...

item.title: The Dark Side of Social Media Fame: Ali Abulaban #shorts
item.description: What really stands out in this case is how the polished world of online influence can mask deeply rooted issues behind the scenes. Ali built a persona that looked confident, charismatic, even humorous — yet beneath that veneer was someone struggling with control, insecurity, and escalating paranoia. When you think about this case, what hits you hardest — the contrast between his online persona and his real behaviour, the escalation of jealousy, or the tragic impact on the victims who never saw this coming?

media:content.media:title: The Dark Side of Social Media Fame: Ali Abulaban #shorts
media:content.media:description: What really stands out in this case is how the polished world of online influence can mask deeply rooted issues behind the scenes. Ali built a persona that looked confident, charismatic, even humorous — yet beneath that veneer was someone struggling with control, insecurity, and escalating paranoia. When you think about this case, what hits you hardest — the contrast between his online persona and his real behaviour, the escalation of jealousy, or the tragic impact on the victims who never saw this coming?

item.title: The Evil Hidden in Her Own Family - Tia Rigg
item.description: Tia Rigg was a beautiful little girl from Cheetham Hill in Manchester. Even though she had a slightly turbulent family life no one expected her uncle John Maden to turn into a monster and destroy the lives of many. Join me in my latest True Crime episode where I break down this case and how it unfolded in April 2010. Em x

media:content.media:title: The Evil Hidden in Her Own Family - Tia Rigg
media:content.media:description: Tia Rigg was a beautiful little girl from Cheetham Hill in Manchester. Even though she had a slightly turbulent family life no one expected her uncle John Maden to turn into a monster and destroy the lives of many. Join me in my latest True Crime episode where I break down this case and how it unfolded in April 2010. Em x
